summary: Bases/Outs Indicators Completed Game Hide Spoilers OFF
description:
GIVEN a game is in a final/completed state
AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF

steps.action:
WHEN a user assigns focus to a game tile
OR does not assign focus to a game tile
steps.result:
THEN gray square 1st, 2nd, and 3rd base indicators are displayed in a paw print orientation
AND three gray circle out indicators are displayed below the base indicators
AND the base/out indicators are center-right justified in the non-matchup portion of the game tile
